layout.grid_strategy: Mode A (Tetris) for top dashboard metrics, Mode B (Control Room) for data panels, Horizontal flex rows for movie grids

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 h-16 flex items-center justify-between
navigation.instructions: Logo on left, primary links (Home, TV Shows, Movies, Algorithms) center, Search and Profile on right.

hero_section.classes: relative w-full h-[70vh] flex flex-col justify-end pb-16 pt-24
hero_section.instructions: Full width image covering background. Left aligned text content over gradient overlay. Include Title (H1), Synopsys, Similarity Score Badge, and CTA (Play, Details).

movie_row.classes: flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-6 scrollbar-hide snap-x
movie_row.instructions: Title above the row. Items must maintain 2:3 aspect ratio (w-40 h-60 md:w-48 md:h-72). Use group-hover for interactive effects.

movie_card.classes: relative rounded-md overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:z-10 group cursor-pointer border border-transparent hover:border-white/20 shadow-none hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-black
movie_card.instructions: Image fills card. On hover, show gradient overlay at bottom with title, match score, and action icons (play, info).

similarity_panel.instructions: When viewing movie details, show a breakdown of why it's recommended: TF-IDF keywords overlapping, Genres, Director/Cast. Use Shadcn Progress bars or Recharts Radar.

algorithm_selector.classes: flex items-center space-x-2 bg-black/40 p-1 rounded-full border border-white/10
algorithm_selector.instructions: Allow user to switch recommendation algorithms (TF-IDF, Genre, Hybrid, Plot). Use Shadcn Tabs customized to look like pills.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards scale by 1.05. Overlay fades in. Buttons transform brightness or background color.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in on load using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Horizontal rows must have smooth scrolling (scrollbar hidden).

hero_background.description: Cinematic theater screen for hero featured background

data_testing_strategy: All interactive elements must have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='movie-card-1', data-testid='algorithm-tab-tfidf', data-testid='search-input'.
